title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on international development and aid.

questions.question: Some critics argue that international aid creates dependency rather than sustainable development. Do you agree with this view?
How much responsibility do wealthier nations have to contribute to the development of poorer countries, and why?

script.text: Some critics argue that international aid creates dependency rather than sustainable development. Do you agree with this view?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
